scripts.prebuild: npx tsx scripts/check-token-compliance.ts --guard && npx tsx scripts/check-motion-sanctuary.ts && npx tsx scripts/check-ds-kbd.ts && npx tsx scripts/check-no-chip-lit-in-arrival.ts && npx tsx scripts/check-citation-delegation.ts && npx tsx scripts/check-duration-reasons.ts && npx tsx scripts/check-stage-tempo-divergence.ts && npx tsx scripts/check-no-raw-now.ts && npx tsx scripts/check-tri-mouth.ts && npx tsx scripts/check-verify-bundle.ts && COMMUNITY_DB_PATH=:memory: npx tsx scripts/check-user-journey.ts && npx tsx --test src/lib/client/keep-hotkey.test.ts && npx tsx --test src/lib/client/keep-legend.test.ts && npx tsx --test src/lib/client/ds-kbd-lit.test.ts && npx tsx --test src/lib/client/arrival.test.ts && npx tsx --test src/lib/citation-golden.test.ts && npx tsx --test src/lib/journey-golden.test.ts && npx tsx --test src/lib/api-stamp-golden.test.ts && npx tsx --test src/lib/collectiveMemory.clock.test.ts && npx tsx --test src/lib/tri-mouth-inventory.test.ts && npx tsx --test scripts/check-citation-delegation.test.ts && npx tsx --test scripts/check-duration-reasons.test.ts && npx tsx --test scripts/check-tri-mouth.test.ts && npx tsx --test src/lib/stage-ease.test.ts && npx tsx --test src/lib/stage-tempo.test.ts && npx tsx --test scripts/check-stage-tempo-divergence.test.ts
scripts.test:tri-mouth: npx tsx --test src/lib/tri-mouth-inventory.test.ts && npx tsx --test scripts/check-tri-mouth.test.ts
